162 E1E E1E_SELF_DEPER (E1E) Self Depreciation CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - verbal expressions of distress - self depeciation. 0 = Indicator not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 = Indicator of this type exhibited daily or almost daily (6, 7 days a week), (-) = Unknown, (sp) = Blank.
163 E1F E1F_UNREAL_FEARS (E1F) Unrealistic Fears CHAR 1
